title: Synaedrys pruinosa
taxonomy: Synaedrys pruinosa is classified as a species of tree in the family Lauraceae. It is native to East Asia and is also known as the Chinese laurel. The classification of Synaedrys pruinosa places it within the genus Synaedrys, which is a group of evergreen trees. The plant is also sometimes classified under the genus Persea, but Synaedrys is the more commonly used classification. Further study and classification may be necessary to fully understand the relationships between Synaedrys pruinosa and other plant species.
